author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

The Latest State of the Economy Report is Out!

To cap off 2022, we've released the third Star Atlas State of the Economy Report!

You'll find updates on the following:

• Star Atlas Census
• Labor Force and Employment
• Statistical Methodology

 | Report and Appendix: https://staratlas.com/newsroom/economic-reports
